records.name: Glass Canal Night Market
records.summary: A floating bazaar of hacked kiosks, burner clinics, synth-food barges, and whisper brokers.

details.opportunity: anything can be bought if you know who is desperate

records.name: The Copper Maw
records.summary: An industrial district of slag rain, freight rails, and refineries that never fully power down.

records.name: Cicada Heights
records.summary: A stacked residential zone where rooftop gardens cling to luxury towers above failing utility blocks.

records.name: Null Pier
records.summary: A decommissioned port turned data-smuggler haven where old customs scanners now hide contraband servers.

records.name: Saint Mercy Arcology
records.summary: A sealed medical arcology advertising safety while quietly harvesting behavioral and biometric data.

records.name: Signal Graveyard
records.summary: A canyon of dead broadcast towers and pirate transmitters where rogue coders test illegal spectrum warfare.

records.name: Rainstep Bazaar
records.summary: A pedestrian maze of monorail shadows, knockoff fashion, rolling protests, and food stalls running on stolen power.

records.name: Obsidian Reef
records.summary: An offshore tower cluster for executive retreats, offshore banking, and very discreet disappearances.

details.opportunity: one score can change a life
